titleStmt.title: SII 40.126: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 126. (A.R. No. B. 105 of 1930.) Palapatturu, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab lying in front of the Chennakēśava temple in the village.
This is dated 1472, Sādhāraṇa Kārttika śu. 12, corresponding to 1550 A.D., October 22, Wednesday.
Records the gift of a village to the temple of Raghunātha of Voṇṭimiṭṭa by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Śrīraṅgarāju Rāmayadēva-Maharāja and his younger brother Tirumalayyadēva-Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābdaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu vēyinni
naṁnnūṁṭa ḍebhaireṁḍu Agunanēṭi sādhāraṇa saṁvvatsara kā
¨rttika śu 12 puṇyakālamaṁddu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīrasadāśivadēva mahārāyalu vidyānaga
ramaṁddu ratna śiṁhvāsanārūḍḍuṁḍai pṛthivi sāmaṁbrājyaṁ śēyucu
ḍagānu . śrīman mahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara śrīraṁgarāju rāmayadēva ma
hārājuluṁgārunnu tana tammuḍu tirumalayyadēva mahārāju
luṁgārunnu sādhāraṇa saṁvvatsara kā¨rttika śu 12 puṇyakālamaṁddu
voṁṭimiṭṭa raghunāthaniki sahiraṇyōdaka dhārādānapū¨rvvakamugā
nu dhāravośi yiccina dha¨rmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnanu yī grāmānaku cellē pā
lu sahanu jala pāpāṇa Akṣiṇi Āgāmi śiddhā sādhyālu yi Aṣṭabhō
ga tējasvāmyāluṁnnu Ācaṁdra¨rkasthāyigā Anubhaviṁppa dhāravośi
yiccina dhammaśāsanamu . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasētunṛ pāṇāṁ kālē kālē
pālanīyō bhavabhi sa¨rvvānētāṁbhāvina pā¨rtthivēṁ¨rdrābhūyōbhū
yō yācatē rāmacaṁdra . śrīraghunātani śāsanamu śrīśrīṁ jēna
yī grāmaṁ śrīraghunāyakula
padi tarānaku Aṣṭōttaraśatōpacā
rālaku sama¨rpiṁcina kramaṁgāna Idi ya
vvaru ganaka guttalaku vummaḷikeku Aḍigi
puṁccukoṁnnavāru kāśilōnu gaṁggakarata
tanu gōbrāṁhmala tama tallitaṁḍru
la vadhiṁcina pāpāna pōvuvāru śrīrāmacaṁdrā
yanamaḥ
Digital edition of SII 40.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
